/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/traffic_monitor.dir/src/app/pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_monitor.dir/src/capture/frame_preproc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_monitor.dir/src/capture/gstreamer_camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_monitor.dir/src/common/clock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_monitor.dir/src/common/logging.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_monitor.dir/src/detect/detector_stub.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_monitor.dir/src/detect/onnx_yolo_detector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_monitor.dir/src/fusion/footpoint_mapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_monitor.dir/src/geometry/bbox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_monitor.dir/src/geometry/polygon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_monitor.dir/src/ipm/ipm_config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_monitor.dir/src/ipm/ipm_warper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_monitor.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_monitor.dir/src/speed/speed_estimator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_monitor.dir/src/speed/track_state_table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_monitor.dir/src/track/iou_tracker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_monitor.dir/src/ui/overlay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_monitor.dir/src/zone/zone_config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/traffic_monitor.dir/src/zone/zone_manager.cpp.o -o traffic_monitor  /usr/lib/libopencv_gapi.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_photo.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.8.0 -lpthread /usr/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.8.0
